results.name: run with no tool prints usage + tool list, exits 1
run --list exits 0 (explicit list is a success)
run <tool> prints the tool's JSON on stdout
run accepts short names + --project convenience
run enforces required args (same message as MCP)
run rejects unknown tools with the known list
run surfaces tool errors as {error} JSON, exit 2
composeDirections persists .font-lab/preview.json
composeDirections records the menu as composed/tailored
persisted set round-trips through readPreviewSet
compose steers the non-panel stack to screenshot_directions (and off preview.html)
resolveCaptureSet: explicit directions win
resolveCaptureSet: composed set is the default
select resolves the id against the COMPOSED set (not starter)
no composed set + no fallback → actionable refusal (never silent starter)
allowFallback:true still yields the deterministic starter deliberately
captureDirections refuses BEFORE any server/browser work
font_lab_preview REFUSES while screenshots are untried (gate before set resolution)
the refusal names the escape hatch + the detected dev command
font_lab_preview_screenshots shares the same lock
a failed managed-server start records capture-blocked (stage: dev-server)
the recorded failure unlocks the sheet and rides it as unlockedBecause
clearCaptureBlocked re-locks (what a SUCCESSFUL capture does)
force:true builds the sheet without a failed attempt
without force, the same project still refuses (a forced build doesn't unlock)
status.preview reports the composed set + the screenshot next step
`font-lab analyze` (no run) dispatches the tool table
an unknown word still prints help (never boots the server)
preview font cache targets .font-lab/fonts, public/ untouched
CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE marks a remote container
Codespaces marks remote WITH port forwarding
no markers → local
explicit remote:true overrides a local detection
explicit remote:false overrides a cloud marker
start carries the environment + workflow consequences
live_instructions reframes for remote (no localhost handoff)
hostArgsFor: next → -H 127.0.0.1
hostArgsFor: vite family → --host 127.0.0.1
hostArgsFor: compound script → no guessed flags
normalizeOrigin pins localhost/:: to 127.0.0.1
detectDevCommand reads the fixture's dev script
managed server starts and reports a 127.0.0.1 origin
managed server answers HTTP
managed command carries the forced host bind
stop() tears the server down
no dev script → actionable error (bind + background-task guidance)
